channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Moms' responsiveness to their babies may predict later childhood psychiatric disorders  Medical Xpress
  5. Moms’ responsiveness to their babies may predict later childhood psychiatric disorders  EurekAlert!

item.title: Quality of Muscles, Not Size, Lowers Heart Attack Risk - Newser
item.description:
1. Quality of Muscles, Not Size, Lowers Heart Attack Risk  Newser
  2. People with strong chest and back less likely to have a heart attack, analysis suggests  The Guardian
  3. The chest and back exercises to help reduce heart attack risk  The Telegraph
  4. 50-year-olds with a lower risk of heart attacks may have one thing in common, new study reveals  Woman & Home
  5. I’m a personal trainer. These five exercises could reduce your risk of a heart attack  The Independent

item.description:

  2. Microbiome Research Points to Potential Lupus Treatment  Technology Networks
  3. UT Health San Antonio researchers may have found another way to treat lupus patients  MSN

item.title: Nearly half of kidney transplant patients never even get started - ScienceDaily
item.description: Nearly half of kidney transplant patients never even get started  ScienceDaily
